rationale.R1.5: The agent output is well-structured with clear sections addressing each critique and providing recommendations, indicating a coherent end-to-end plan.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly discloses uncertainties about citations and LDC IDs, marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, covering all requested dimensions effectively.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions are introduced; the critique is constructive and avoids errors.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with sources and reasons, ensuring traceability.
